title: Scott's YouTuber Modpack
description: This Pack was designed for youtubers and twitch streamers to use in-order to make high quality youtube videos.
body:
This Modpack is designed for use by youtubers and twitch streamers. It includes mods such as Sodium, Replay Mod, Essentials, Litematica, Zoomify, and many more!
If you want to support my modpack making journey or have any questions about the pack, Feel free to join my discord server: [https://discord.gg/XY6nzttZ24](https://discord.gg/XY6nzttZ24)
